title: imagebuildah.Build: consolidate cleanup logic
body:
Consolidate all of the logic related to cleaning up after a build into a helper function in `Build()`.  This lets us ensure that we always clean up images after cleaning up containers, so that we don't have to worry
about ordering when some images may be in use by containers because we wanted access to a root filesystem for a stage whose image was reused.
